_comment: Allowlist for agent-image-component-scan.yml (N1 built-in component scan). Managed by Captain.

B324.reason: Three MD5 usages in letta 0.16.7 (memfs_client_base.py:148, local_sandbox.py:271, utils.py:1042). All are non-cryptographic uses: UUID derivation from agent_id+label, IPC message framing checksum, and deterministic string-to-UUID conversion. None are used for authentication, password hashing, or digital signatures. The Python hashlib flag usedforsecurity=False is missing but the intent is clearly non-security. Upstream code quality issue — bandit B324 fires because the flag is absent. Risk: LOW (no auth or secret-handling context). Tracked for next letta version bump.
B324.upstream_issue: https://github.com/letta-ai/letta/issues — pending upstream report at next image bump review
